description: From the manufacturer Bergamot & Jasmine Bath and Shower Gel An Aromatherapy, soap-free body wash to gently effectively cleanse. Enriched with skin-softening naturals including Coconut to care for your body. Sink into spa bliss with an aromatic, nourishing bathing experience. Key Ingredients: Bergamot - Refreshing, zingy aromatic. Jasmine - Delicate, elegant white floral aromatic. Lemon, Lime and Orange Essential Oils - A trio of citrus oils to soothe the skin and senses. Bergamot & Jasmine Body Lotion A beautifully light body lotion that moisturises, nourishes and softens every day, infused with a luxurious blend of pure essential oils including Bergamot and Jasmine, to leave the skin delicately fragranced and beautifully soft. For Best Results: Use morning and evening after your bath or shower. Massage into skin in firm, upward, circular movements until fully absorbed. Bergamot & Jasmine Hand Wash Gentle yet effective hand wash for cleansed and nourished hands. Beautifully fragranced with Bergamot and Jasmine pure essential oils for an aromatic experience. Expertly formulated to comfort the skin and suit sensitive hands. Key Ingredients: Bergamot & Jasmine Essential Oils – elegant and delicate aromatics Coconut Cleansers -- gentle yet powerful cleanser that is naturally foaming Citrus Peel Oils -- refreshing oils for supple feeling skin Bergamot & Jasmine Hand Lotion A lightweight yet hydrating lotion to nourish, protect, and hands, nails and cuticles. Enhanced with a rich blend of pure essential oils including Bergamot and Jasmine, to leave the skin and senses soothed. Key Ingredients: Bergamot & Jasmine essential oils -- elegant and delicate aromatics Sweet Almond Oil – nourishes and hydrates the skin Shea Butter – Smooths and softens the skin Bergamot & Jasmine Bath and Shower Gel Bergamot & Jasmine Body Lotion Bergamot & Jasmine Hand Wash Bergamot & Jasmine Hand Lotion Buying Options Add To Basket Add To Basket Add To Basket Customer Reviews 4.4 out of 5 stars 118 4.2 out of 5 stars 68 4.8 out of 5 stars 20 3.8 out of 5 stars 7 Price — no data £14.28 £ 14 . 28 £14.40 £ 14 . 40 £13.60 £ 13 . 60 What? Bath and Shower Gel Body Lotion Hand Wash Hand Lotion Size 250ml 250ml 250ml 250ml For Best Results Use daily in the shower or add to running water for a luxurious foaming bath. Massage into damp skin to create a rich lather and rinse off. Use morning and evening after your bath or shower. Massage into skin in firm, upward, circular movements until fully absorbed. Suitable for all skin types. Lather into hands, nails and cuticles. Rinse away with warm water. Use daily, as and when required. Massage into hands, nails and cuticles until fully absorbed.

product_details_tab_data.Product Benefit: A beautifully light body lotion that moisturises, nourishes and softens every day
product_details_tab_data.Ingredients: Aqua (Water), Isopropyl Palmitate, Caprylic/Capric Triglyceride, Prunus Amygdalus Dulcis (Sweet ALMOND) Oil, Cetearyl Alcohol, Glycerin, Butyrospermum Parkii (Shea) BUTTER, Limonene, Phenoxyethanol, C12-16 Alcohols, Citrus Aurantium Dulcis (Orange) Peel Oil, Glyceryl Stearate SE, Xanthan Gum, Palmitic Acid, Sucrose Cocoate, Fragrance* (Parfum), Lecithin, Citrus Aurantium Bergamia (Bergamot) Fruit Oil, Citrus Limon (Lemon) Peel Oil, Sclerotium Gum, Benzoic Acid, Citrus Aurantifolia (Lime) Oil, Juniperus Mexicana Oil, Dehydroacetic Acid, Linalool, Abies Sibirica Oil, Eucalyptus Globulus Leaf Oil, Litsea Cubeba Fruit Oil, Mentha Arvensis Leaf Oil, Zingiber Officinale (Ginger) Root Oil, Phytic Acid, Citral, Ethylhexylglycerin, Cymbopogon Nardus (Citronella) Oil, Melaleuca Alternifolia (Tea TREE) Leaf Oil, Myrocarpus Fastigiatus Oil, Geraniol, Tocopherol, Cistus Ladaniferus Oil, Ferula Galbaniflua (Galbanum) Resin Oil, Jasminum Officinale (Jasmine) Flower Extract, Lavandula Angustifolia (Lavender) Flower Extract, Citronellol, Dipteryx Odorata Seed Extract, Fucus Vesiculosus Extract, Sodium Hydroxide, *100% Natural Fragrance
product_details_tab_data.Safety Warning: For external use only. If product gets into the eyes, rinse thoroughly with warm water.
